1: # Dedicated Invoice Manager Dashboard & Calculations
2: 
3: Create a dedicated Invoice Manager page in the admin panel sidebar. This page will be organized category-wise (Store Products, One Rupee Pujas, Vedic/All Pujas, and Health/Wealth Problem Pujas) and allow editing section-wide defaults as well as specific item overrides in a unified place.
4: 
5: ---
6: 
7: ## Proposed Changes
8: 
9: ### Database Schema
10: 
11: #### [MODIFY] [20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/migrations/20260615000000_dynamic_invoice_settings.sql)
12: Update migration script to:
13: 1. Add `invoice_settings JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb` to:
14:    - `public.one_rupee_poojas`
15:    - `public.general_poojas`
16:    - `public.problem_poojas` (for health/wealth pujas)
17:    - `public.website_pooja_products`
18: 2. Seed the global settings row under key `'global_invoice_settings'` in `website_settings` with sections:
19:    - `store_products`
20:    - `one_rupee_poojas`
21:    - `general_poojas`
22:    - `problem_poojas`
23: 
24: ### Admin Dashboard (App_admin)
25: 
26: #### [NEW] [InvoiceManagerPage.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/InvoiceManagerPage.jsx)
27: Create a dedicated Invoice Manager component containing:
28: 1. **Section Selection Tabs**: Store Products, One Rupee Pujas, Vedic/All Pujas, Problem Pujas (Health/Wealth).
29: 2. **Global Section Settings Form**: Configure default GST rate (%), Promo Discount (%), and Delivery Fees/Thresholds (for Products)
<truncated 425 bytes>
Discount (%), and delivery options (for products).
36:    - Saves directly to the `invoice_settings` column of the corresponding row.
37: 
38: #### [MODIFY] [App.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/App.jsx)
39: 1. Remove the Invoice tab from `SettingsPage` (revert `SettingsPage` to its clean general/integrations state).
40: 2. Import the new [InvoiceManagerPage.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/InvoiceManagerPage.jsx) component.
41: 3. Add a new sidebar menu item **Invoice Manager** with a `Receipt` icon.
42: 4. Set up router path `/invoices` to load `InvoiceManagerPage`.
43: 
44: ### Mobile Application
45: 
46: #### [MODIFY] [CartContext.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/context/CartContext.tsx)
47: 1. Update `fetchDbItemMetadata` query for `problem_poojas` to select `invoice_settings`.
48: 2. Return cached metadata with `invoice_settings` correctly mapped.
49: 
50: #### [MODIFY] [cart.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/cart.tsx)
51: 1. Map dynamic calculations using the new structure:
52:    - Identify table source (`one_rupee_poojas`, `general_poojas`, `problem_poojas`, `website_pooja_products`) to apply the correct category global fallback keys.
53:    - Perform item-specific promotional discounts, tax/GST additions, and delivery threshold calculations.
54: 
55: ---
56: 
57: ## Verification Plan
58: 
59: ### Automated Checks
60: 1. Run a script to seed the database migration columns.
61: 2. Verify Admin build succeeds.
62: 
63: ### Manual Verification
64: 1. Navigate to the new **Invoice Manager** tab.
65: 2. Select different sections (e.g. One Rupee, Problem Pujas) and change global settings. Click save and verify.
66: 3. Search for a specific item (e.g. "Ganesh Puja" or a specific rashi stone). Edit override values, click save, and check the database.
67: 4. Add to cart in the app and verify totals match settings.
68:
